name: daily-strata
description: Nightly gather of Slack, Gmail, and calendar activity posted to a Strata project over MCP. Requires a Strata MCP server: on install you are prompted for your project's server URL.

strata_server_url.title: Strata MCP server URL
strata_server_url.description: Your Strata project's MCP endpoint, e.g. https://strata-one-phi.vercel.app/api/mcp/YOURPROJECT
